C/C FOR SETTLEMENT IN DEPT 622, LHATCH, JUDGE; MMANZELLA, CLERK. PLNTF COUNSEL JBORNSTEIN, ESQ AND DEF IN PRO PER CONFER WITH COURT. MATTER DOES NOT SETTLE.

JUDGE DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK 09:00AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. DANIEL BORNSTEIN FOR THE PLTF. THE DEFT, BILLY BROWNELL, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. CASE IS SETTLED. CSR WAIVED. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IS SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BROWNELL, BILLY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 755 WALLER STREET, S.F., STAYED UNTIL APR-23-2000, LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF TO PAY THE DEFT $ 2,000 IN CASH ON OR BEFORE 04/23/00. DEFT TO FILE DISMISSAL WITH THE RENT BOARD BY 04/20/00.
